title: J.B. Hunt to expand intermodal container fleet by 40%
text: J.B. Hunt Transport Services announced Wednesday plans to grow its intermodal container fleet to 150,000 units over the next three to five years. The additional capacity would expand the fleet by more than 40% from the close of 2021.

title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. Announces Participation in Raymond James 43rd Annual Institutional Investors Conference
text: LOWELL, Ark.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBHT) President and Chief Executive Officer John Roberts, Chief Commercial Officer and EVP of People and Human Resources Shelley Simpson, and Chief Financial Officer and EVP of Finance John Kuhlow will address the Raymond James 43rd Annual Institutional Investors Conference at 1:05 p.m. eastern time on Tuesday, March 8, 2022.
